why_it_matters: A newly started PRN opioid must be documented for medication reconciliation and dosing safety, and meperidine is specifically high-risk (Beers-listed) in a 76-year-old with fall risk and possible neurotoxicity.
Documenting counseling on opioid-related sedation and fall risk is essential in an elderly, fall-fearful patient and drives the required post-dose nursing monitoring.
